_about: Friday to Friday Podcast. `episodes` = full-length episodes (lead content: YouTube + Spotify embeds + transcript). `clips` = the short daily YouTube clips, demoted. episode_number is provisional/site-assigned (channel publishes no official numbers). transcript_source flags caption quality. spotify_episode_id is null until Mat provides the Spotify show/episode IDs — the show was not findable via Spotify search, so those embeds are pending.

episodes.title: Maxo Kream, Prof, 1900Rugrat, Radamiz, Jody Fontaine & Maiya the Don
episodes.synopsis: The full weekly roundup — the hosts run through the week's new releases from Maxo Kream, Prof, 1900Rugrat, Radamiz, Jody Fontaine, and Maiya the Don.

episodes.title: Tierra Whack, Key Glock, YG, Benny The Butcher, Nicholas Craven & Boldy James, The Alchemist
episodes.synopsis: A packed week in review — the hosts break down new drops from Tierra Whack, Key Glock, YG, Benny The Butcher, the Nicholas Craven & Boldy James collab, and The Alchemist.

clips.title: Tyler, the Creator's Whisper Rap Twist
clips.synopsis: The surprise Tyler, the Creator feature on YG's "On the Low" — bracing for whisper-rap and getting a laid-back subversion instead.

clips.title: Flyana Boss — Under the Influence
clips.synopsis: Eight songs of catchy, club-ready bangers — standouts Wasabi, Bands Up, Jungle, and the EDM-trap "Feeling It."

clips.title: RJ Payne — Growing Paynes EP
clips.synopsis: RJ Payne's five-track "Growing Paynes" EP — sharp lyricism over Padre's boom-bap beats, and a more introspective turn.
